summary: Ad-hoc bench: tag 50-100 held-out chunks with the new prompt, compare agreement-with-review at score >= 2 against the old prompt. Capture the diff in docs/concept-hierarchy/ as a one-time notes file. Decision gate: if agreement materially worse, debug before proceeding to clustering. Per design.md §13 step 5.

resolution.note: Bench run on 90 held-out chunks (same Qwen model, isolating the prompt). v2 grouped prompt regressed agreement-with-review at score>=2 (precision 95.1→85.1, recall 71.7→50.4, agreement 78.9→61.5). Decision gate FAILED → tagging reverted to flat v1 prompt (commit f47fe1a); hierarchy kept as a separate retrieval/structure layer. Confound: benched in mirror state. Write-up: docs/concept-hierarchy/bench-v1-vs-v2.md.
